title: Birlasoft is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Birlasoft is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Birlasoft, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Birlasoft:
Birlasoft is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Birlasoft!
